#1Cyber Safety App
FAMILY SAFETY SHIELD

Maa-Baap Ko Scam Se Bachao —
Apne Phone Se, Real-Time Mein

Aapke parents ko agar koi fraud call aaye, toh aapko turant alert milega — chahe aap kitni bhi door ho. ScamShield X ka Family Safety Shield feature aapke ghar ko digitally secure rakhta hai, 24/7. Ek app, poore family ki protection.

  • Instant SOS Alerts Jaise hi parents ke phone par scam call detect ho, aapko 3 seconds mein push notification milti hai — location aur call details ke saath.
  • Remote Block Feature Apne phone se parents ke device par suspicious numbers ko remotely block karo — bina unhe kuch kiye. Ek tap, instant protection.
  • One-Click 1930 Helpline Emergency mein directly National Cyber Crime Helpline 1930 se connect karo — app ke andar se, bina number dial kiye.
Har 2 minute mein ek senior citizen scam ka shikaar hota hai
